arts.ttl: Training Update: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane, Joshua Kimmich, and Dayot Upamecano all completed Saturday’s training
arts.sum: Harry Kane trained with the team today but a decision on whether he will play against Frankfurt tomorrow will be made shortly before the game [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/zR4bD2gkQX Bayern Munich stars Harry Kane, Joshua Kimmich, and Dayot Upamecano all completed training on Saturday without incident.

arts.ttl: Bayern München 25-26 Third Training Kit Leaked - Matching the Third Kit Color
arts.sum: The FC Bayern München's 2025-26 third training strip will have the colors reversed from their third shirt.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich navigated Celtic and Bayer Leverkusen, but now the fixtures are even tougher following the Champions League draw . A congested schedule full of games, starting with a home match against Eintracht Frankfurt in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Does Dayot Upamecano want a release clause in his new Bayern Munich contract? Two reports offer contrasting info
arts.sum: The player’s camp would like to include a release clause in the new contract, just like Harry Kane and Jamal Musiala, but Bayern bosses are unwilling to accept that. Dayot Upamecano and his camp wanted a release clause in the new contract, but Bayern managed to convince him to extend without one.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich to make late decision on Harry Kane
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany will make a late decision on Harry Kane’s involvement for Bayern Munich against Eintracht Frankfurt on Sunday afternoon. The 31-year-old was replaced at half-time against Celtic in Tuesday…

arts.ttl: Report: Alexander Nübel extends deal with Bayern Munich, expected to stick with VfB Stuttgart for 2025/26
arts.sum: According to a report from Bild journalists Christian Falk and Julian Agardi, the contract of Bayern Munich loanee Alexander Nübel automatically extended when Manuel Neuer decided to ink a new deal with the Bavarians. Following Manuel Neuer’s renewal, Alexander Nübel’s Bayern contract has also been automatically extended by one more year until 2030.

arts.ttl: Paul Wanner needs reassurance from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report captured by @iMiaSanMia, Wanner is only willing to stay at Bayern Munich if he is assured of getting regular appearances for the Bundesliga giants. Usually, two seasons of regular play time is considered enough to develop a 19 year old, but Wanner is concerned about how much time he will get if he stays.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Eintracht Frankfurt preview: Back-to-back Meisterschale ties for Bayern
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have a tough test against their "Angstgegner" (bogey team) Eintracht Frankfurt on Sunday in the Bundesliga, in a bid for the league leaders to avenge a 5-1 loss at the Deutsche Bank Park last season.

arts.ttl: Michy Batshuayi on replacing Omar Marmoush, choosing Eintracht Frankfurt and facing Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Batshuayi: "Yes, of course, every player wants to play as much as possible and score goals. Michy Batshuayi joined Eintracht Frankfurt in January to boost the Eagles' hopes of qualifying for the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane (calf) likely to miss Frankfurt clash
arts.sum: Bundesliga top scorer Harry Kane is likely to miss Bayern Munich's home league game against third-placed Eintracht Frankfurt on Sunday, having yet to fully recover from a calf muscle injury, coach Vincent Kompany said on Saturday.
